rulings.Case Title: PAUL GALINDO et al VS. SECURITY TITLE INSURANCE CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday September 15, 2015, line 1. Plaintiff's Motion for Withdrawal of Attorney of Record Continued to October 7, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers to department 501 no later than September 25, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DALE DUNCAN ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday September 15, 2015, line 2. Defendant Mwangi's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Each cause of action is sufficiently alleged. The Court notes that moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B (no courtesy copy of the operative complaint) and failed to comply with CRC 3.1113(f). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DALE DUNCAN ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike And Motion To Strike By Defendant Anna Kihage To Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint Punitive Damages
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday September 15, 2015, line 2. Defendant Kihage's Motion to Strike First Amended Complaint DENIED, request for punitive damages is sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DALE DUNCAN ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday September 15, 2015, line 2. Defendant Kihage's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Each cause of action is sufficiently alleged. Additionally, as to the alter ego allegations, demurrer is not proper to challenge specific allegation in the complaint. The Court notes that moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B (no courtesy copy of the operative complaint) and failed to comply with CRC 3.1113(f). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DALE DUNCAN ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday September 15, 2015, line 2. Defendant Mwangi's Motion to Strike First Amended Complaint DENIED, request for punitive damages is sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANGELA GOLDFEIN VS. ISAAC SUN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday September 15, 2015, line 3. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address all issues raised by demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DONALD L LAZZARETTO AND CONNIE LAZZARETTO TRUSTEES VS. KATHY RENEE HIRZEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel; Memoof P & A; Declaration In Support Thereof And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendat Kathy Renee Hirzel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday September 15, 2015, line 4. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel DENIED. P failed to "set forth specific facts showing good cause justifying the discovery sought by the inspection demand" and P failed to provide a copy of Defendant's objections. See CCP 2031.310. Requests for Sanctions are denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA VS. TEDDY F HAWK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant To Respond To Written Discovery And Produce Documents; Deem Matters Admitted; And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday September 15, 2015, line 5. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Defendant shall provide responses without objections to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Request for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $560. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. MONICA LAM ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday September 15, 2015, line 6. Defendant's Motion to Strike Complaint OFF CALENDAR, withdrawn by the moving party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. MONICA LAM ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday September 15, 2015, line 6. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint OFF CALENDAR, withdrawn by the moving party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHAOMING CHEN ET AL VS. SHARON YVETTE CROSS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Order Compelling Discovery, Establishing Admissions, And Conditionally Granting Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday September 15, 2015, line 7. Defendant's Motion for Relief from Discovery Order GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. The Motion is GRANTED as to the requests for admissions. Admissions are not deemed admitted. Motion is otherwise DENIED. = (501/REQ)
